title: CCI orders probe against Mrs India Inc over unfair terms imposed on beauty pageant participants
description: The Competition Commission of India (CCI) has ordered an investigation against Mrs India Inc over allegations that it imposed unfair and restrictive conditions on participants and winners of its beauty pageant for married women.The order was passed on a complaint filed by Rinima Borah Agarwal, who was a participant and runner-up in the Mrs. India Inc beauty pageant held in 2024.A coram comprising CCI Chairperson Ravneet Kaur and members Anil Agrawal, Sweta Kakkad and Deepak Anurag found that a p
